description_long: This object is a white virtual reality headset with a smooth, rounded front and a prominent black visor area for the eyes. The front face features a printed logo and the text 'Virtual-Reality University,' suggesting it is a branded educational or demonstration device. The headset has a sturdy, adjustable head strap system, including a central top strap and two side straps, all designed for secure and comfortable wear. Small circular sensors or cameras are visible on the front and sides, likely for tracking user movement and spatial orientation. The overall construction appears to be primarily plastic with some foam padding visible inside for comfort. The design is sleek and modern, with minimal external buttons or controls, emphasizing ease of use and portability.
description: A sleek white virtual reality headset with a black visor, adjustable straps, and a branded front face, designed for immersive experiences.
description_view_0: Front view showing the logo, branding, and two small sensor/camera ports on either side of the main faceplate.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the side strap, the curvature of the headset, and the side sensor/camera.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the head strap system and the black foam padding for comfort around the eyes.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view, similar to view 1, showing the other side strap and sensor/camera.
